mapper.select: SELECT eq.id, eq.name, eq.unit, COALESCE(eq.description, '') AS description, COALESCE(pi.total_in, 0) AS total_purchased, COALESCE(si.total_out, 0) AS total_sold, COALESCE(pi.total_in, 0) - COALESCE(si.total_out, 0) AS current_stock FROM egg_qualities eq LEFT JOIN ( SELECT quality_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_in FROM purchase_items pi2 JOIN purchases p ON pi2.purchase_id = p.id WHERE p.status = 'completed' GROUP BY quality_id ) pi ON eq.id = pi.quality_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT quality_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_out FROM sale_items si2 JOIN sales s ON si2.sale_id = s.id WHERE s.status = 'completed' GROUP BY quality_id ) si ON eq.id = si.quality_id ORDER BY eq.id

SELECT 'purchase' AS type, p.id, p.purchase_date AS date, pi.quantity, pi.unit_price, s.name AS party_name FROM purchase_items pi JOIN purchases p ON pi.purchase_id = p.id JOIN suppliers s ON p.supplier_id = s.id WHERE pi.quality_id = #{qualityId} AND p.status = 'completed' ORDER BY p.purchase_date DESC

SELECT 'sale' AS type, s.id, s.sale_date AS date, si.quantity, si.unit_price, c.name AS party_name FROM sale_items si JOIN sales s ON si.sale_id = s.id JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id = c.id WHERE si.quality_id = #{qualityId} AND s.status = 'completed' ORDER BY s.sale_date DESC
